layman_headline: Ethereum shows early signs of recovery with strong buying candles near support.
layman_explanation: The crypto market is still in a fearful state, but sentiment is improving from extreme fear last week. Ethereum has posted three consecutive strong up-candles (a 'Three White Soldiers' pattern), suggesting buyers are stepping in after a long decline. It's sitting just above $1,900 support with a decent shot at reclaiming $2,000. While the broader environment favors Bitcoin over altcoins, ETH is the safest large-cap alt to play a bounce.
layman_action: Consider a small position in Ethereum near $1,910 with a firm stop-loss at $1,850. Take profits around $2,000. This is a measured recovery bet, not an all-in trade.
expert_reasoning: ETH presents the cleanest swing setup among candidates. The Three White Soldiers pattern on the daily chart is a high-confidence bullish reversal signal, supported by RSI at 43.85 (neutral with room to run up). The 5-day momentum of +19.7% shows strong buying pressure returning. Key support at $1,900 is only 1.4% below, providing a tight risk floor, while resistance at $2,000 offers a 3.8% upside with a 2.84x risk/reward ratio. Bitcoin ETF inflows (6-day streak, $203M added) create a positive macro tailwind. Fear & Greed improving from 25 to 33 suggests the worst of the selloff may be behind us. High BTC dominance at 56.7% is a headwind for alts, but ETH historically leads alt recoveries when BTC stabilizes.
risk_factors: Bitcoin dominance at 56.7% continues to suppress altcoin performance — ETH could lag even if BTC holds
CoinDesk reports inflation concerns resurfacing with oil above $85, which could trigger broader risk-off selling
The NIGHT bridge exploit (515M tokens stolen) adds negative sentiment to smart contract platforms broadly
watch_list: BTC price action around $66,000 — a breakdown below $65,000 would drag ETH through its $1,900 support
Alphabet earnings and AI trade sentiment — risk-on/risk-off signal for correlated tech assets
Fear & Greed trend continuation — if it crosses above 40, altcoin rotation becomes more likely
market_context: The crypto market is in a fear-driven consolidation phase with BTC holding near $66K and ETF inflows providing a floor. Sentiment is improving from extreme fear but hasn't yet shifted to neutral, creating a window for early positioning before the crowd.
context_banner: Bitcoin ETF inflows extend to 6 days while Fear & Greed recovers from extreme lows — early-stage risk appetite returning favors quality altcoin entries.

key_signals.description: ETH RSI at 43.85 is neutral with significant room to expand upward, avoiding overbought risk that plagues LDO and USDG.
Three White Soldiers candlestick pattern on ETH confirms sustained buying pressure and potential trend reversal from the downtrend.
Fear & Greed at 33, improving from 25 yesterday and 27.4 weekly average — trend of improving sentiment supports buying into fear.
Bitcoin ETFs extended their inflow streak to 6 days with $203M added, providing institutional demand that anchors BTC and enables alt recovery.
Inflation concerns resurfacing with oil above $85 and BTC under $66K awaiting Alphabet earnings — macro risk remains but is partially priced in at current fear levels.
